chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 579 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4506/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on MA No.4507/2025 (R/Surety) 18.09.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Faisal Inayat, who on 10.07.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing five original special savings certificates of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 14.07.2025, which has subsequently been confirmed on 18.07.2025, as is evident from the order of even date, annexed with the application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose the application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
